notes: TEMPERANCE's six-face arcana die. Rolled on Threshold Rolls during a Temperance run. The faces lean toward measure — CLEAN POUR (the perfect ratio) is the highest success; HEAVY (the over-pour) is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The ratio lands. Advance two toward the off-pour catch.
Success ★. The drink is correctly built. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The pour is a quarter-ounce shy. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 OFF POUR).
Partial. The garnish is in the wrong dish. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 OFF POUR).
Failure. The pour is a half-ounce heavy. +1 OFF POUR. Maddie's hand is faster than her count this round.
Wild. ★★ if you have GARNISHED this turn — the bar lands clean on the finish. Otherwise: failure, and the neon OPEN flickers once.
